entry.title: Re: How to change templates in Manage Journal Entry Templ...
entry.content: Dear Venu or other experts

entry.title: Re: How to change templates in Manage Journal Entry Templ...
entry.content: Dear Venu or other experts The person in charge created a template that is easy for they to input data. Other members also using it. However, if the person in charge leaves the company, can other members modify this template? Currently, when I try to modify it, I faced the following error. And also I cannot modify it. How can I modify it? (For example, create a new one or add authrization to the user) Please tell me if there are any other ways.

entry.title: Automatically overflow last row of table to next page in Smartform
entry.content:
Experts,

I have a smartform which prints Consumption data for a Contract account. Data is displayed in a table which can contain dynamic no of rows. I display contract account name in one of the table columns. Few accounts have shorted names and few accounts have longer names. So the height of each row in the table can vary based on this. 

Images attached with name Page 1 shows the last row of the table which is partially displayed in that page. Rest of the data is displayed in the following page. 

Is there a way I can automatically move the last row of the smartform in each page to next page so that the whole record will be shown in 1 page. 

NOTE: I can't say how many rows will come in 1 page as the height of each row can vary based on customer name. Some page might show 20 rows, and some might show 24. So if I say that exactly at the 20th row, move the data to next page, then there will be a lot of whitespace in a few pages which is not desirable. 

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: Discussion forum is no longer moderated
entry.content:
Dear learners,

We hope you enjoyed the course “Putting AI Ethics into Practice at SAP”.

The discussion forum for this course is no longer moderated.
We’d like to thank everyone for submitting their questions, suggestions, and feedback.

As mentioned at the start of the course, the following channels will remain open for you to provide feedback:

  • You can provide feedback on lesson level using the smileys below the videos in the course. 
  • For technical and general questions, use the Feedback function in the top left corner of the learning page.

See you in the next SAP Learning MOOC.

Thank you for choosing SAP Learning!

Kind regards,
Britta Radicke-Schlinsog

(SAP Learning team)

entry.title: Re: Advanced Test Orchestration and Tester assignment using Test Plans in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello k_de,

yes, whatever is described within one of the test cases can be orchestrated with the help of test plans.

Current limitation is the missing functionality to define sequence of test cases in a test plan as guidance for test execution. But this is on our roadmap for next year.

Regards Reiner

entry.title: Re: How to execute SI-CHECK when there are multiple produ...
entry.content:
Hi Vera,
I apologize for any additional inquiries.
I would like to ask you another question regarding the construction of the development environment.
Is it acceptable to run SI-CHECK only on client 000 as mentioned in the blog post you shared?
(Since the development environment was created based on the production environment, the number of clients in the development environment will be the same as the production environment and production clients.)

In his blog post "SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item Check - How to do it right" markus goebel writes:
ーーー
Where to run the Simplification Item Check
The SUM tool will run the Simplification Item Check individually in every system that is being converted to SAP S/4HANA, irrespective of the system type (SBX, DEV, QAS, PRD...).Hence as preparation of each of these system conversions, you should also run the Simplification Item Check manually in every system.

The SUM tool is always running the Simplification Item Check in client 000 of a system. Only running the checks in client 000 will ensure, that data in all clients is checked for inconsistencies. If you run the check in any other client, some of the checks will only return check results for this specific client.

Therefore it’s crucial that, when manually running the checks during the preparation phase of your project, that you run the Simplification Item Check in client 000.
ーーー
Best regards,
Yuji

entry.title: extract supplier master data that has a withholding tax type in bulk
entry.content:
I would like to view the supplier master data that has a withholding tax type but does not have a withholding tax country code.

Is there a way to extract this data in bulk?

entry.title: Re: Terminate one object in contract refx
entry.content:
Hello,

We have two options.

1. Give notice on the individual object rather than the contract.

   Navigate to Term Tab and you can find the notice option- choose Give Notice which will give 2 options as per the below mentioned screenshot.

2. Instead of using the Notice option, you can navigate into the Object Tab and update the relationship to update the terminate date.

 

With best regards,
Nayamath

entry.title: LMS-IAS integration without any Learning-only users
entry.content:
Dear all,

I’m wondering if activating the IAS integration with LMS is necessary. From my understanding, this integration is required for learning-only users since the native login page has been removed. If my customer does not have any learning-only users and all users are from the SuccessFactors platform, I believe the IAS integration might be optional. If IAS is not integrated, are there any side effects? I’m concerned because I noticed the checklist in the 'Learning Home Page Readiness Information' under 'Integrated Learning Setting' says that 'SAP Cloud Identity Services Identity Authentication is activated.

 

 

[ Related Information ]
  • User Native Learning Sign-In is Deleted 
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/product-and-customer-updates/learning-native-login-deletion-2h-2024-innovation-alert/ba-p/144854
  • SAP SuccessFactors Learning and SAP Cloud Identity Services Integration Overview | SAP Help Portal

Thanks

entry.title: sybase 17 db how to repair error validating table in sybase central
entry.content:
We have a Sybase 17 DB with maybe corrupt rows in a table.

When we try to validat the table with sybase central we get an error that the java.sql.Sqlexection [SAP][ODBC Driver][SQL Anywhere] Verbindung wurde beendet.    ( connection was terminatet )

We read that the dbcc command can be used to repair the table but we didn't find out how to start the command.

Thank you for you help

entry.title: Is a Badi required for a Sales Order workflow?
entry.content:
We have followed the BD9 script and tested it, but for the sales order workflow, the workflow does not work without BADI setup. (For reference, for the purchase order workflow, it works without BADI setup)

Therefore our question is, is this required for the workflow or can it be omitted?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is a Badi required for a Sales Order workflow?
entry.content:
Please refer to the following Troubleshooting documentation on the Sales Order Workflow.

"I have defined approval request reasons and assigned them to sales document categories. I have also set up a workflow and activated it. Still, no sales documents are relevant for approvals and sent to an approver."

You might have set up most parts of the approval process, but missed out on the BADI implementation. This means that no approval request reason is set. The sales document remains not relevant for approvals and is not sent to an approver.

Therefore, yes, the BADI is required.

entry.title: Re: Behavior Fiori Elements on SEGW OData V2
entry.content: Ok I solved it by setting the property in the changefile "enableAutoBinding" to true.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code Storyboard
entry.content:
Hi @T1mey , FYI, the latest application logic editor has been available in production.

Regarding your question on `error` event handler, it's not supported yet from LCAP app logic editor, it could only be done manually, but please avoid the content to be overwritten by the app logic editor.

In addition, would you mind listing the missing handlers here (or send me email xin.ye@sap.com)? so that we can take them into account for our improvement, thanks.

entry.title: Re: Delta processing inside SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @Wanda_Soetomo 

Why, in this implementation, the choice was made to not use the built-in "Delta Capture" functionality available for the local table?

What does this custom approach provides which "Delta Capture" does not?

I think it is important to highlight such reasons in the post, so that readers can make better informed choices.

Thank you!

Matnr is on both CDS and already with leading zero.

Coming to WERKS it is alphanumeric say E001 and LGORT say 1200. Both are as it is in DB.

entry.title: SAP BTP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello,

I used SAP Build Apps to build forms with several pages. Now, I'm trying to find the best solution to store the data recorded or captured in the forms. I heard that SAP BTP has a database storage. If that is true, how can this be enabled? Is there any guidelines or steps on how to use it? 

If BTP does not have database, what is the best solution to store the data and how it can be done?

entry.title: Use of Account type option into Chart of account SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi team,

In the chart of accounts, account types there are three choices: Sales, Expenditure and Other.

what is main use of it? what happened if all chart of account in all drawer has selected Expenditure option ?

SAP B1 , SAP Business One, Account Type

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: How to manage table and report password fields
entry.content:
Again, you have to encrypt those passwords when saving to database, and decrypt those when reading from database...

In html format you have to use HTML <input type="password">

 

<form action="/action_page.php">
  <label for="username">Username: </label>
  <input type="text" id="username" name="username"><br>
  <label for="username">Password: </label>
  <input type="password" id="password" name="password"><br>
  <input type="submit" value="Submit">
</form>

entry.title: Re: bin determination according to FEFO rule
entry.content:
"I have two storage bins in the same storage type, each containing handling units (HUs) with different expiration dates: BIN1: 01/10, 01/11, 01/12 BIN2: 01/09, 01/13, 01/14 I need to pick a quantity of 20 with the earliest expiration dates."

Well, besides that it general you should avoid such a putaway strategy when you want to pick by any proper strategy: there are several things which influences what happens here: what are your settings?

- storage behaviour, putaway rule, 
- Level of available quantity
- Mixed storage settings

- What do you see when checking physical stock / available stock?

- Does the system propose which HUs to pick?
Brgds

Juergen

entry.title: Re: In personas 3.0 how do we wrap a text to show in muli...
entry.content:
Scripting will help: Code example

var str = "Begriff1 Begriff2";

// Separate the string at the space character:
var parts = str.split(' ');

// seperate with line break:
var result = parts.join('\n');

// put result into the field:
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/wlblPersonas_173382101538058").text = result;

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 : How to create form with OData (deep insert)
entry.content: Hi Joseph, I wish you could also provide the code in _tContextElements. Although I have tried using RAP to implement OData Deep Insert with Fiori, I am also learning the classic way through SEGW.

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Release News 2408 – External Entities
entry.content:
@AttilaBerencsi 

This is not intended.
It only works if you do everything dynamically:
Instead of

SELECT FROM name PROVIDED BY schema
Use
SELECT FROM ('name PROVIDED BY schema')

This should do the trick.

Best

Andrea

entry.title: Re: How to extract the XML file with data for dunning let...
entry.content:
Hi all,

Review the solution with detailed steps provided in KBA 3544204 - XML for Dunning Notices

Best Regards,
Jyothi

entry.title: Re: Flow function: "Set repeated item value" suddenly not working
entry.content:
I created an app connected to Northwind's Employee entity. I created a container that is repeated with the Employees, and then have a container inside that is displayed or hidden based on the Extension field. A text field can be clicked to hide/show that container.

The logic for the Hide/Show text is a "Set repeated item value" flow function.

And here are the properties for the flow function:

I just set the extension to 1 to display, and to empty string to hide. 

I'm sure there must have been a change (I will alert dev), but to help find where the change was made, I am trying to isolate when the "bug" occurs and when it doesn't occur.

entry.title: Transitioning Flat File Storage from Shared Disk to Microsoft SharePoint in SAP BW 7.4
entry.content:
Hello SAP BI Community,

In our SAP BW 7.4 landscape, we previously utilized a shared internal disk for storing flat files used as data sources. However, this disk is scheduled for decommissioning.

We are exploring the possibility of replacing this shared disk with Microsoft SharePoint to store and manage these flat files. Before proceeding, I would greatly appreciate your inputs on the following:

  • Is this transition feasible within the SAP BW framework?
  • What are the technical implications or limitations of integrating SharePoint as a source for flat files?
  • Are there specific configurations or tools needed to enable this integration?
  • Could SharePoint affect performance or file accessibility compared to a shared disk?

If anyone has experience with a similar setup or can share detailed guidance, best practices, or relevant documentation, it would be incredibly helpful.

Looking forward to your insights!

Best regards,
Norman

entry.title: Re: Trigger Build Process Automation Instance from S/4 HANA On-Premise using ABAP Code

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM is now available in EU Access
entry.content:
Will there be a possibility to switch an existing CloudALM instance to EU-Access? 

For us one possibility would be to drop the existing tenant (until now no systems where connected) and request a new CloudALM instance, is that possible?

Thanks for your help and for this good news.

entry.title: Issue with Previewing SAP Build Apps on Mobile
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm facing an issue with the SAP Build Apps mobile version. While trying to preview my app on the desktop, I generate a temporary code for login via PIN code. However, when I enter the code in the "Preview on your device" option on my mobile, it keeps showing "incorrect code" despite multiple attempts and refreshes.

Does anyone have any suggestions or solutions for this issue? I'd really appreciate any help to resolve this so I can preview my app on mobile.

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,

Yashmin Behera

@Dan_Wroblewski 

@JesseSukhbayar 

@PierreCol 

SAP Build

entry.title: Looking for a Function Module that would return the list of HU's linked to an ODO in EWM
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

My client has a requirement to print a packing list before goods issue when the staging is completed for an Outbound Delivery Order. The packing list will be the standard delivery note /SCWM/DLV_NOTE but enhanced and tailored to their needs. However, since it is generated before goods issue, I cannot use ERP tables to get the list of all handling units linked to the delivery document. 

Could you please help me find a function module or any other tool that would return me the list of handling units based on a delivery document? 

Thank you

entry.title: Where can I learn to manage entitlements with SAP Entitlement Management?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Implementing SAP Entitlement Management learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey offers a comprehensive look at SAP Entitlement Management, exploring how master data, basic configurations, and entitlement modeling can optimize and streamline entitlement processes. 
The journey concludes with an examination of API and event monitoring, provisioning orchestration, and entitlement consumption, which tracks and records the usage of entitlements by customers to ensure compliance and accurate reporting.

Learning objectives
In this intermediate-level learning journey, Implementation Consultants will:

  • Discover the architecture of SAP Entitlement Management (SEM) and learn the processes for integrating and synchronizing with other SAP systems.
  • Explore the role of business categories, units of measurement, and entitlement generation rules in managing entitlements.
  • Learn how distribution channels deliver entitlements, how business events trigger entitlements, and how entitlement models define the rules and criteria for entitlements.
  • Discover how SAP Entitlement Management uses entitlement mapping to ensure consistent representation and management of entitlements from various sources; synchronizes entitlement-related master data with other systems; creates rule set definitions to generate entitlements; and sets up background jobs to automate routine tasks.

Prerequisites

  • Managing SAP Entitlement Management

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: change the number of container in QA02 process
entry.content:
Hi,

How to change the number of container for recurring inspection in QA02 process. I need to update the number of container during QA02.

entry.title: Re: Second Half 2024 Release: What's New in SAP SuccessFactors Time Management
entry.content:
@Bernardo_Santos  you need to enable Work Tech configuration and download the App from the Teams App Store. The App itself is free and relies on module license only, therefore does not require a separate license.

Here is how you enable the App: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/3adee415c1eb4b918bc0172afc76948c/7e014829b6684da3849fe2a4e2142f3a.html  and a video demo: https://sapvideo.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/?entry_id=1_3om3clss 

Here is how to configure Time Off in the App: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/3adee415c1eb4b918bc0172afc76948c/c7c03c106cf9423a8ebccb3e164fe4ec.html  and a video demo of the feature: https://sapvideo.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/?entry_id=1_86gqx1zd

entry.title: HTTP Status 500 when trying to see schedule log in SAP Business Objects 4.3
entry.content:
Hello,

We have installed recently SAP Business Objects 4.3 and when trying to see the log button (information about the instance) for any schedule I get the Http Status 500-Internal Server Error pop-up screen. In the Lumira/tomcat logs I don't see any relevant information. The Lumira/tomcat/CMC is installed on Linux and the SAP Analysis is installed on Windows server.

In the console I see the error comes from here:

hostname:8080/BOE/CMC/2409031449/ao.web/jsp/historystatus/historystatus.faces?objIds=17710&loc=en&service=%2Fadmin%2FApp%2FappService.jsp&pvl=en_US&pref=maxOpageU%3D%3BmaxOpageUt%3D200%3BmaxOpageC%3D%3Btz%3DCET%3BmUnit%3D%3BshowFilters%3Dtrue%3BsmtpFrom%3Dtrue%3BpromptForUnsavedData%3Dfalse%3B&actId=4777&appKind=CMC&containerId=17279&bttoken=MDAwRENvYzhhO1ZoMD41Ojk1OlVZbkFdN2dNW1lPPDAEQ&showApply=true&cmc=true&cafWebSesInit=true&bttoken=MDAwRENvYzhhO1ZoMD41Ojk1OlVZbkFdN2dNW1lPPDAEQ 

Could it be some parameter or setting that it isn't set?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Stored Procedure Notification
entry.content:
Hi

  I want to know which Visual Studio Option is to be selected for Add-On in Sap B1 Hana. I am using Visual Studio 2022.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: bin determination according to FEFO rule
entry.content: Storage Behavior: General Storage or Bulk Storage Putaway Rule: Addition to existing stock or empty bin Level of Available Quantity: Addition to stock at the bin level Mixed Storage Settings: Mixed Storage: Allows multiple handling units (HUs) with different batches of the same product Mixed Storage in HUs: Not allowed Mixed GR Dates: Not allowed Mixed SLEDs (Shelf Life Expiration Dates): Not allowed

entry.title: How to add missing match code to PS Fiori Apps?
entry.content:
Dear,

The search help of the entry field works well on the SAP GUI but doesn't exist in the corresponding FIORI apps.
When opening the project or WBS element overview, the match code doesn't exist or the fields shown in the search help are not representative.
 
Below a list of apps that have anomalies:
1. Project Definition Overview (F1976)
2. WBS Element Overview (F1974)
3. Network Overview (F1973)
4. Network Activity Overview (F1970)

It appears that for these specific fields, either the matching code is not available or the necessary filter is absent.
Can you tell us how to proceed to fix it?
Best regards

entry.title: Re: bin determination according to FEFO rule
entry.content: As well I see we have sap note for similar issue: 2962880 - System allows same product/batch with different SLED in the same storage bin

entry.content: Hello, Have you found a solution on how to manage this via MRP or other methods? Thanks

entry.title: In editable alv i am using MT_MOD_CELLS data is incorrect
entry.content:
Hi Experts 


I have created a editable alv report and i am getting the value using MT_MOD_CELLS in that i am getting a wrong value .


for example 
value A = 9000 given in the output of the report 

but its taking 90.00

entry.title: Re: EWM - How to change a field become a Mandatory field in SCWM/ADGI?
entry.content: I tried and it works as expected

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: BW Series – Getting Started (Part 2)
entry.content:
@bpoteraj We are aiming to support derivations also in other variable types in Q3.2025 (subject to change).

@PMathieu Thank you for the insights. The error message "The query executed with errors. No values set for mandatory HIDDEN variable." can pop up if the Input Parameter cannot be properly filled, for example, if the datatype is set to e.g. string(4) but the input requires string(10). In your context, that would be the text which is used instead of the ID. The text association will be required on the exit table level, then you will see the respective description when choosing the value for the input in the Analytic Model.

entry.title: Effect of changing password for job user?
entry.content:
Dear Experts!

I would like to confirm one thing regarding the users we use for executing jobs on SAP private cloud system.

Due to password policy change, I will have to update password for users currently used for executing jobs. I am concerned about the effect it might have on job execution after updating the password.

Would it cause any issues like job cancellation or error if I change the password? All of the users are system users.

Additionally, there is a user named "BATCH_USER" in our system that is also responsible for execution of some jobs but I am not able to see the user in SU10. Is it a special user that does not require password change?

thank you in advance.

Fujita

entry.title: Re: Adding headers during Fiori Deployment
entry.content: Totally agree, tracing might seem okay, but I have Git to SAP Deployment happening through a common pipeline user (like RFC User) and when the backend creates transport it will be through this common user (also the owner of the TR) and not the actual developer. How do I ensure that TR's are created with this User?

entry.title: cannot add/edit the value in Job Function with "+" sign
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

Here is my reproducing issue: 

1. Go to Manage Data 

2. Select Position, type the position ID 

3. Under Job Info > Job Function, there is a "+" sign displayed here. 

4. Click Take action > Make correction 
5. Check at the Job Function again but the system not allow to add/edit the values

Anybody knows how to remove this "+" sign? How it happen?

entry.title: Re: Preceding Whitespace is trimmed when an IDoc is sent from SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: Hi Smitha, Have you got any solution for this issue?

entry.title: SAP - UIDs zusammenführen
entry.content:
Thank you Rebecca Dolan who collaborated with the translation on this blog. 

 Sie versuchen, Ihre Universal ID zu verknüpfen und erhalten die folgende Fehlermeldung?

Gehen Sie gemäß dem Wissensdatenbankartikel wie folgt vor: 2914815 - Aufheben der Verknüpfung von Benutzern mit einer SAP Universal ID oder Löschen der UID

Kunden stehen zwei Optionen zur Verfügung.

Wenn Sie einen S-User haben, können Sie im SAP for Me Portal einen Fall anlegen. 

  1. Einen Fall erstellen:

Erstellen Sie einen Fall für die Komponente XX-SER-UID, und geben Sie die folgende Informationen an:

  1. Primäre E-Mail-Adresse der SAP Universal ID:
  2. Gesamte SAP Universal ID löschen: JA/NEIN
  3. Verknüpfung aufheben (S-User-ID, P-User-ID):
  4. E-Mail-Adresse entfernen:
  5. Grund für die Anforderung:

Der Fall muss von einem der S-User angelegt werden, die mit dem SAP-Universal-ID-Konto verknüpft sind, oder von einem Super-, Cloud- oder Benutzeradministrator der Kundennummer, zu der die primäre SAP-Universal-ID-E-Mail gehört.

Wenn Sie keinen S-User haben oder keinen Fall in SAP for Me anlegen können, können Sie sich an das Customer Interaction Center wenden.

  1. Wenden Sie sich an das Customer Interaction Center (CIC):

Senden Sie Ihre Anfrage per E-Mail an das Customer Interaction Center, und geben Sie Folgendes an:

  1. Primäre E-Mail-Adresse der SAP Universal ID:
  2. Gesamte SAP Universal ID löschen: JA/NEIN
  3. Verknüpfung aufheben (S-User-ID, P-User-ID):
  4. E-Mail-Adresse entfernen:
  5. Grund für die Anforderung:

Die E-Mail muss von derselben E-Mail-Adresse gesendet werden, die mit der SAP Universal ID verknüpft ist, und/oder mit derselben E-Mail-Adresse in einem Konto (S-User-ID, P-User-ID) übereinstimmen, für das Sie eine Aufhebung der Verknüpfung anfordern.

Nachfolgend finden Sie die E-Mail-Adressen des Customer Interaction Centers für alle Regionen:

  • Für China, Hongkong, Indonesien, Malaysia, Pakistan, Philippinen, Taiwan, Thailand, Korea, Singapur und Vietnam: support.asia@sap.com
  • Für Australien und Neuseeland: support.australia@sap.com
  • Für Österreich, Belgien, Tschechien, Dänemark, Finnland, Frankreich, Deutschland, Griechenland, Ungarn, Irland, Israel, Italien, Luxemburg, Niederlande, Norwegen, Polen, Portugal, Pakistan, Slowakei, Südafrika, Afrika, Spanien, Schweden, die Schweiz und das Vereinigte Königreich: support.emea@sap.com
  • Für Indien: support.india@sap.com
  • Für Japan: support.japan@sap.com
  • Für Andina, Mexiko, Brasilien und Region Sur: support.latinamerica@sap.com
  • Für Katar, Kuwait, Vereinigte Arabische Emirate, Oman, Jordanien, Bahrain, Ägypten, Saudi-Arabien, Jemen, Syrien, Libyen, Libanon, Palästina, Irak und Sudan: support.mena@sap.com
  • Für Amerika und Kanada: support.usca@sap.com / support.emea@sap.com

Schulungen und Zertifizierung

Sie können das Schulungsteam kontaktieren, indem Sie einen Fall anlegen. Gehen Sie dazu wie folgt vor: So wenden Sie sich an das SAP Education - Learning-Hub-Team um Unterstützung zu erhalten

Wenn Sie eine Schulung im SAP Learning Hub abgeschlossen haben, haben Sie möglicherweise ein Badge mit einem Lernzertifikat erhalten.

Der Support prüft die SAP Universal ID, um zu ermitteln, ob Ihrem SAP-Universal-ID-Konto Schulungszertifizierungen zugewiesen sind.

Wenn Schulungszertifizierungen zugewiesen sind: UID Löschanfragen werden erst verarbeitet, wenn die Schulungszertifizierungen auf ein anderes Konto übertragen wurden (siehe Wissensdatenbankartikel 2547250 und 2764910).

Wenn keine Schulungszertifizierungen zugewiesen sind kann die Universal ID ohne weiteres gelöscht werden.

Das Aufheben der Verknüpfung von S- oder P-Usern mit einer Universal ID hat keine Auswirkungen auf die mit der Universal ID verbunden Schulungszertifizierungen.

Bevor Sie die Löschung eines SAP-Universal-ID-Kontos anfordern, lesen Sie bitte diesen KBA 3383999, der gültige Gründe für die Anforderung einer Löschung darstellt. Sobald das SAP-Universal-ID-Konto vom zuständigen Team gelöscht wurde, ist die Löschung dauerhaft und kann nicht mehr rückgängig gemacht werden. Beachten Sie auch, dass sich das Löschen des SAP-Universal-ID-Kontos auch auf Ihr SAP-Community-Konto auswirkt. Wenn Sie das SAP-Universal-ID-Konto löschen, wird auch Ihr SAP-Community-Konto gelöscht.

Die Löschung kann auch über den SAP Universal ID Account Manager angefordert werden. Klicken Sie dazu auf "Datenschutz" auf der linken Seite des Bildschirms, und klicken Sie auf "Kontolöschung anfordern" (siehe https://account.sap.com/manage/privacy).

Danke fürs Lesen!

Wir hoffen, dass Sie diesen Artikel hilfreich fanden. Sie können sich jederzeit gerne an das Customer Interaction Center wenden, wenn Sie Hilfe mit den oben aufgeführten Schritten benötigen.

Hier können Sie mehr Blogbeiträge vom Customer Interaction Center lesen!

Weitere verwandte Themen

2948234 - Häufig gestellte Fragen - SAP Universal User ID (UID)

SAP-Universal-ID-Informationsseite

Linked Blogs English - https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs-about-sap-websites/sap-merging-universal-ids/ba-p/13950118

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Release News 2408 – External Entities
entry.content:
@Muthu21 

Unfortunately, the scenario does not work currently because Steampunk is currently provisioning the HANA in such a way that we cannot use the Cloud Connector via the ABAP SDA Adapter. There is also no roadmap for this, so we cannot make any official statement on when it will be available.

entry.title: Re: Second Half 2024 Release: What's New in SAP SuccessFactors Time Management
entry.content: Thanks for the update. The configuration done in Teams, will have to be done by a system administrator, right? Doesn't each employee have to do it on their own PC, right? By activating this feature, it won't only be available for Time Off, right? What other features are available in Teams?

entry.title: Blending for SAP BW Live Data Models
entry.content:
Hi all, 

My objective is to blend models using a live data connection from BW4HANA to create a consolidated table that includes both actual and budget data. I have two queries from the BW system: one for actual data and another for budget data. Using the live data connection, I extracted the data and saved these models in SAC. The volume of data is not large enough to trigger the limit exceed restriction. However, when attempting to blend the data whether using the optimized design or the classic design the data does not blend successfully, and the following warnings are displayed.

What do these warnings indicate? Specifically, the first warning is problematic since I need to create financial statements. How can we successfully perform data blending in this scenario? please be specific avoid sharing generalized solutions 

 

Warning: Blending is not supported between the linked models. This link can only be used for filtering. 

Warning : You can blend these models as long as the amount of data returned from the systems not performing the blend is within each system's defined limit

entry.title: Re: how to configure organization management
entry.content: Well, in my opinion, I'd recommend Passexam-4-sure. Several of my coworkers and I have utilized their exam dumps, and the outcomes have generally been positive. These dumps contain the most recent exam questions, each accompanied by a verified answer. Additionally, their customer support is exceptionally helpful. I found their services to be very beneficial, and I'm confident you will too. Wishing you the best of luck!

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Error when using measure-based...
entry.content: I got the same error code. Can we get an answer here, please?

entry.title: MDK BAS Version vs Mobile Cloud Build SDK Version
entry.content:
Hi,

we develop on BAS with MDK Version 24.11 ("_SchemaVersion": "24.11")

In Mobile Cloud Build the max version is 24.7.5

Why we can't choose 24.11 ?

Is There a way to build the APK with last version in Mobile Cloud Build without necessary using the MDKClient_SDK?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: JAVA Connector 3.1
entry.content:
I do not want to repeat what Markus already said, to which I fully agree.
But to also answer your main point:
Yes, of course JCo offers the possibility to connect to an unlimited number of SAP systems from a single Java process.

entry.content:
Hi Junwu, thanks a lot for your reply.

However, I already tried this way but I get following error in the console.

 

 I guess, standard app of type Odata V4 is expecting MDC target aggregation only.

2024-12-10 10:56:11.183800 Change 'id_1733824468021_223_addXML' could not be applied. Merge error detected while processing the JS control tree. - Error: Error during execPromiseQueueSequentially processing occurred: The content of the xml fragment does not match the type of the targetAggregation: sap.ui.mdc.FilterField
    at .../resources/sap/ui/fl/library-preload.js:55:5445

I don't have release 751 available - would it be possible that you can send me the full list (as Excel)?

Thank you!

Best regards,
Gregor Brandstätter

entry.title: Item Master Data
entry.content: We have created a large quantity of new items in SAP which have not yet been used.   We have now decided that we need to change the item numbers.  Can I use the import from excel feature to amend the item numbers rather than do manually. I have tried this without success.

entry.title: Are you looking for SAP Ariba Contracts learning materials for beginners?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Implementing SAP Entitlement Management learning journey.

Overview
This beginner learning journey will introduce you to the key features and functions for contract workspace creation and amending. Through self-paced content, system simulations, and videos you will learn how to handle the creation, publishing and amending steps in the contract lifecycle.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, business users, consultants, and administrators will be able to create, publish and modify contract workspaces using the SAP Ariba Contracts application.

Prerequisites

  • Discovering SAP Ariba Contracts

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How Customers and Partners Can Give Input to the Roadmap of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Editi
entry.content:
Hi @Anja_Wilde 

Can you advice me which session to use in the SAP Continuous Influence program if I want to add something for S/4 OnPremise related to creations of Location master data used in SAP TM?


Best Regards,
Gitte Greibe.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements Navigation to Canvas page event
entry.content:
I followed the blog you referred and as mentioned by others in the comments, nothing loads on the UI on the landing page.

Were you able to fix that?

Also, for your problem did you already try modifying the route pattern in controller of 'comp2' to receive the parameters passed?

entry.title: Why we need to integrate solution documentation with charm in Solution Manager.
entry.content:
Why we need to integrate solution documentation with charm in Solution Manager.

We are planning to Integrate the Solution documentation with CHARM. Currently we are storing the documents like (FS/TS/IMG/UAT/Test Plant) as a attachment in Request for Change and Change Document. 

What are the benefits after this integration?
Also whether we should not update our documents under Request for change? if so what is the suggested way to manage the changes related documents.

entry.title: Re: Indirect Labor Tracking within SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Re: Author Spotlight: Daniel Mateo - December 2024 Edition

entry.title: Re: Need to take monthly report for SQL statements...Is there any possiblity?
entry.content: Yes in Netweaver 7.5 you have in ST04 a line "Expensive Statements" under Performance section

entry.title: Re: Registration Steps for SAP Certification.
entry.content:
Hi, is the NEFT transaction procedure changed in India? I want to purchase the exam subscription. I mailed education.india@sap.com about the procedure and got this response :

"Dear Learner,

Thank you for reaching out to us.

We want to inform you that we have recently upgraded our Case Management Tool to provide you with an improved support experience.

Please note that all future requests must be submitted through our new portal. This mailbox is no longer in use and any inquiries submitted here will not be processed.

New Support Portal: User Support Center where you may find answer already via our FAQ tabs

How to submit a new case:

  1. Visit the User Support Center. 
  2. Click on the “Need help” icon in the lower right 
  3. Click "Create Case"
  4. Input the necessary details, including a clear description of your request
  5. Submit the case

 

For SAP Instructors only:

  1. Visit the User Support Center. 
  2. Click on the “Need help” icon in the lower right 
  3. Click "Create Case"
  4. Select “Practice Systems” category

5.Input details and attachment if applicable.

6.Submit the case.

We appreciate your understanding during this transition and look forward to continuing to provide you with excellent service through our new and improved system.

Best regards,

SAP Training and Adoption Customer Services team

This is an automatic e-mail, please do not reply to this e-mail "

I am not sure what to do now. any help is appreciated. Thank you

entry.title: Re: broken link on "Implementation Assets for SAP Success...
entry.content:
Hi all!

If someone still need the document and can't get it, just feel free to email me nicoabuscemi@gmail.com and I can send it to you. I can't upload it here just because all the restrictions the site has about the extension file.

Hope it is useful!

Regards

entry.title: Join tables vbak and konv
entry.content:
I have a problem concerning joining vbak and  konv. I want the contents to be in the same table at the output, but it does not seem to work. I cannot use the easy way of using JOIN, as KONV is  a special table.

Any help ?

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_vbak,
         vkorg TYPE vbak-vkorg,
         vbeln TYPE vbak-vbeln,
         erdat TYPE vbak-erdat,
         knumv TYPE vbak-knumv,
         vtweg TYPE vbak-vtweg,
         kalsm TYPE vbak-kalsm,
       END OF ty_vbak.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_konv,
         knumv TYPE konv-knumv,
         kposn TYPE konv-kposn,
         stunr TYPE konv-stunr,
         kschl TYPE konv-kschl,
         kdatu TYPE konv-kdatu,
         kherk TYPE konv-kherk,
         kinak TYPE konv-kinak,
       END OF ty_konv.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_tab,
         vkorg TYPE vbak-vkorg,
         vbeln TYPE vbak-vbeln,
         erdat TYPE vbak-erdat,
         vtweg TYPE vbak-vtweg,
         kalsm TYPE vbak-kalsm,
         knumv TYPE vbak-knumv,
         kposn TYPE konv-kposn,
         stunr TYPE konv-stunr,
         kschl TYPE konv-kschl,
         kdatu TYPE konv-kdatu,
         kherk TYPE konv-kherk,
         kinak TYPE konv-kinak,
       END OF ty_tab.

DATA: it_vbak  TYPE TABLE OF ty_vbak,
      it_vbak2 TYPE TABLE OF ty_vbak,
      it_konv  TYPE TABLE OF ty_konv,
      it_tab   TYPE TABLE OF ty_tab,
      wa_tab   TYPE ty_tab,
      wa_konv  TYPE ty_konv.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-001.
SELECT-OPTIONS: s_date FOR vbak-erdat,
                s_vkorg FOR vbak-vkorg NO INTERVALS,
                s_vtweg FOR vbak-vtweg NO INTERVALS,
                s_vbeln FOR vbak-vbeln NO INTERVALS.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b2 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-002.
SELECT-OPTIONS:
            s_kposn FOR konv-kposn NO INTERVALS,
            s_stunr FOR konv-stunr NO INTERVALS,
            s_kschl FOR konv-kschl NO INTERVALS,
            s_kherk   FOR konv-kherk NO INTERVALS,
            s_kinak   FOR konv-kinak NO INTERVALS,
            s_kdatu FOR konv-kdatu.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b2.

START-OF-SELECTION.


  SELECT knumv
    FROM vbak
    INTO TABLE @DATA(it_knumv)
      WHERE erdat IN @s_date AND
            vkorg IN @s_vkorg AND
            vtweg IN @s_vtweg AND
            vbeln IN @s_vbeln
      ORDER BY kalsm ASCENDING.

  SELECT knumv, kposn, stunr, kschl, kdatu, kherk, kinak
      FROM konv
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @IT_knumv
      WHERE knumv = @IT_knumv-knumv AND
            kdatu IN @s_kdatu AND
            kposn IN @s_kposn AND
            stunr IN @s_stunr AND
            kschl IN @s_kschl AND
            kherk IN @s_kherk AND
            kinak IN @s_kinak
      INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @IT_tab.

  SELECT vkorg, vbeln, erdat, vtweg, kalsm
   FROM vbak
    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @IT_knumv
    WHERE knumv = @IT_knumv-knumv
   INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @IT_vbak.

MOVE-CORRESPONDING it_vbak TO it_tab.

entry.title: Re: Adobe Forms Barcode is printed over Border
entry.content: Thanks! it seems to be working!

entry.title: Re: Creating database in CCC
entry.content: hi Varsha, This error what you are getting is due to multiple issues, if you are using the latest version of CCC , then you need to have a affinity group created and tagged to one of the VMs, generally other than CCC, if that is also done, then try adding the Local Ips of all your infra in the host file at each of the machines you are using in the infra

entry.title: Re: Second Half 2024 Release: What's New in SAP SuccessFactors Time Management
entry.content:
@Bernardo_Santos yes requires an admin to set it up first. in the help doc we have the detailed steps, please go through it. 
the steps enables the App itself, for the Time Off feature to show up, you need additional Time Off configurations, as explained in the help doc. 
Other features in the App can be found in the same chapter of the doc.

entry.title: Re: In editable alv i am using MT_MOD_CELLS data is incorrect
entry.content: I don't know what your exact case is, but if it's a currency amount linked to a currency field whose value in the same line is a currency key with 0 decimal (e.g. COP, JPY, etc.), it's normal to have 90.00 (concept of currency in ABAP: https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abenddic_currency_field.htm#@@ITOC@@ABENDDIC_CURRENCY_FIELD_3). It could be also due to a conversion routine.

entry.title: Re: bin determination according to FEFO rule
entry.content: I think that "Level of Available Quantity: Addition to stock at the bin level" is already enough to mess it up. The system is not proposing which HU to pick, yes? So how should the system distribute the pick?

entry.title: Re: MDK BAS Version vs Mobile Cloud Build SDK Version
entry.content: @Angelo_Ab We are working on updating the cloud build service with MDK 24.11. It will be addressed shortly.

entry.title: Re: How to undelete Project purchase requisition if netwo...
entry.content:
Hello Tejas.

It will depend on how the purchase requisition was created. If it was created manually through ME51N, you can change the account assignment of the purchase requisition items without any issues. However, if it was created through the network, that is, from a material component, you cannot change the account assignment.
Try changing the network status by undoing the "DLFL - Deletion Flag".

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: Join tables vbak and konv
entry.content:
I guess KONV is a Cluster Table in your system (ECC). It belongs to the cluster KOCLU as you can see in SE11.

You can't use JOIN with a Cluster Table as you can see in the ABAP documentation. So, you're stuck to use FOR ALL ENTRIES. Be careful, fix your code to not running SELECT FAE if the internal table (IT_KNUMV) is empty.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud User and Team Provisioning SCIM API Best Practices and Sample Scripts
entry.content:
Hello Matthew,

For postman, I have tested all the collection in quality environment with script it is running fine but, in production I have created one group in sac production while entering that group name in postman collection to fetch the data am facing the issue like 404 not found, READ team test: Team not found undefined(Collection 456), could you please help me on these.

 

Best Regards,

Juniya B

entry.title: Re: how to configure organization management
entry.content: .

entry.title: How to add Material Description in multiple languages from the Manage Mass Maintenance App?
entry.content:
• Is it possible to add additional short description to material numbers that can be maintained in multiple languages?
  • The material descriptions  e.g. in EN language, or DE language to materials that are already existing in the system.
  • The Migration cockpit cannot be used and the app for mass maintenance didn't work for this activity. How can we do it in a mass way?
  • The app for Manage Mass Maintenance it's only possible to change existing material description in a mass way, but its not possible to insert new language variant.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to add Material Description in multiple languages...
entry.content:
Please consider using this migration object Product - extend existing record by new org levels.

It supports the creation of additional descriptions, which is provided in the above documentation.

Please try this migration object and let me know if you face any issues or errors with this.

entry.title: Re: Author Spotlight: Daniel Mateo - December 2024 Edition

entry.title: Re: Author Spotlight: Tim Koster - November 2024 Edition
entry.content: Great interview @sveabecker

entry.title: Re: Unable to purchase CER006 certification subscription
entry.content: I am also facing same issue, Last to last week I see the buying option there after shifting on the learning there are buying / add to cart is not appeared in the training portal

entry.title: CAP for nodejs安全的暴露接口练习
entry.content:
本文档目的是帮助您初步了解CAP+Nodejs的后端如何暴露接口被外部消费，阅读时间约为0.5小时。

 

使用前提是完成CAP for Nodejs开发入门练习，和CAP for Nodejs部署入门练习，

 

如果您对BTP感兴趣，BTP个人精选内容目录 | SAP Blogs 可能有更多你需要的内容

 

本文档包含以下部分：

1.在本地环境下启动服务并使用postman调用接口

2.将代码部署到BTP后使用postman调用接口

 

1.在本地环境下启动服务并使用postman调用接口

修改srv/risk-service.js，额外向外发布一个service：

 service ExternalAPI {

    entity testRisks as projection on my.Risks;

    action checkDescr(riskId: String) returns{

        descr: String;

};

}

 这里新建的service下包含一个entity和一个action，action接收一个String返回一个String

 

接下来修改srv/risk-service.cds以确定先前定义的action的逻辑

const db = await cds.connect.to('db');
        // 实现 checkDescr action
    this.on('checkDescr', async (req) => {
        let tx = cds.transaction(req);
        // 获取输入参数 riskId
        const { riskId } = req.data;
        console.log(riskId,"xxxxx  request received xxxxxxxxxxxxxxx");
        // 从数据库命名空间中获取名为Risks的表
        const {Risks} = db.entities("sap.ui.riskmanagement");
        try {
            // 查询数据库，获取与riskId对应的descr字段
            const riskResult = await tx.run(SELECT.from(Risks).columns('descr').where({ID:riskId}).limit(1));

            if (riskResult) {
                // 如果找到了对应的risk记录，返回descr
                console.log(riskResult[0].descr,"xx record found xxxxxxxxxxxxx");
                return { descr: riskResult[0].descr };
            } else {
                // 如果没有找到对应的risk，抛出错误
                req.error(404, `Risk with ID ${riskId} not found`);
            }
        } catch (error) {
            // 如果数据库查询出错，返回错误
            req.error(500, `Failed to fetch risk description: ${error.message}`);
        }
    });

 

本地启动后端来查看效果

cds watch

此时命令行会显示4004的链接，按住ctrl后鼠标左键单击即可打开

但由于BAS运行在容器中，要访问到这里的4004，

a.可以在BAS安装rest插件https://github.com/Huachao/vscode-restclient来访问 

b.也可以使用本地postman，首先按住Ctrl单击BAS内提示的localhost:4004 URL来打开后端预览页面，此时可以F12打开开发者工具，找到Application应用这个Tab，再找到Storag-Cookies，会得到一个CookieName和一个CookieValue

例如workspaces-xx-xxxkj_WSR_SESSIONID和

xLix6/X4iaJ8p+1MxxoyHRmFvgdln9yVv4N1y0aSzqaeWV+NMjHRfXXNgrRpHESOGSJE4g8Yg9zCBOyzFJIcmA==

 

然后在postman内新建request：

使用POST方法，URL为后端预览页面URL+/odata/v4/external-api/checkDescr

添加一个header，其Key为 cookie 其Value为 CookieName=CookieValue

另外再添加一个header为Content-Type:application/json

Body为

{

    "riskId":"20466922-7d57-4e76-b14c-e53fd97dcb11"

}

 

最后点击Send,发送请求，查看结果

 

 

2.将代码部署到BTP后使用postman调用接口

为了体现权限区分，这里修改srv/risk-service.cds中的RiskService entity Risks权限中READ分配的对象从RiskViewer修改为authenticated-user（这个权限指的是所有用户，但一般仅作为技术用户用于系统集成，不用于来自前端的访问，详情查阅CDS-based Authorization | capire）

 

在根目录打包并部署后，让我们从postman调用平台上的API

 

首先获取调用权限：进入子账户 实例与租用 实例 cpapp-auth, 在右侧的弹窗中找到服务键值，单击创建，命名为postmanTest 再单击创建，最后点击刚刚创建的服务键值的名字，即可获得clientid， clientsecret，apiurl这几个参数，再进入子账户 空间 dev cpapp-srv ，保存route的URL

 

然后创建获取token用的postman request：

使用GET方式，URL为apiurl+/oauth/token?grant_type=client_credentials，Auth为Basic Auth，Username为clientid，Password为clientsecret, Headers添加Content-Type:application/json的属性，此时点击Send即可看到回复，回复中的access_token即为后续调用所需的认证参数

 

再创建调用接口的postman request:

使用GET方法，URL为cpapp-src的route+/odata/v4/service/risk/Risks, Auth为No Auth, Headers添加Content-Type:application/json和Authorization:Bearer access_token，这里Bearer后有一个空格，access_token则为上一步获取的token

Body留空，即可READ到Risks这个entity，切换URL并添加body后还可以访问到之前定义的ExternalAPI服务

 

关于本文内容有任何问题或见解，欢迎在评论区留下你的想法，如果需要帮助，也可以直接联系到我 arthuryang1996@foxmail.com，感谢你的时间

entry.title: Delete SICF and Gateway Vocabulary Annotations V2
entry.content:
Hi Community,

in some projects we have the problem that although the SICF and the oData service have been deleted, some objects remain in the package.
In particular, this concerns SICF and Gateway Vocabulary Annotations. Is there a separate transaction for this? Deleting from the package via SE80 is not possible.

Thank you.

regards,

Lars

entry.title: Re: Enable/Disable custom action button in SAP Fiori List...
entry.content:
@tejaswikosanam 

In manifest.json, you can specify a function to determine if the action should be enabled or disabled.

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/7619517a92414e27b71f02094bd08d06

"myCustomEnablement": {
     "press": "SalesOrder.ext.CustomActions.navigateExternal",
     "enabled": "SalesOrder.ext.CustomActions.enabledForCompletedOnly",
     "text": "Enabled for Completed"
}
enabledForCompletedOnly: function(oBindingContext, aSelectedContexts) {
     if (aSelectedContexts && aSelectedContexts.length === 1) {
          return true;
     }
    
    return false;
}

entry.title: Issue with telco accelerator
entry.content:
Hello,

telco accelerator has the file hybris/bin/modules/b2c-telco-accelerator/b2ctelcocommercewebservicescommons/resources/b2ctelcocommercewebservicescommons-spring.xml. In the next bean they are using an implementation instead of an interface:

<alias name="defaultTmaSubscriptionBaseValidator"
alias="tmaSubscriptionBaseValidator"/>
<bean id="defaultTmaSubscriptionBaseValidator"
class="de.hybris.platform.b2ctelcocommercewebservicescommons.validator.TmaSubscriptionBaseValidator">
<property name="tmaSubscriptionBaseFacade"
ref="tmaSubscriptionBaseFacade"/>
<property name="tmaDefaultCustomerFacade"
ref="defaultTmaCustomerFacade"/>
</bean>
 
public class TmaSubscriptionBaseValidator implements Validator
{
public static final String DEFAULT_MESSAGE = "Invalid subscriberIdentities";
public static final String INVALID_SUBSCRIPTION_BASE_DATA_MESSAGE = "subscriptionBaseData.invalidValue";
public static final String INVALID_SUBSCRIPTION_BASE_FOR_USER_MESSAGE = "subscriptionBaseData.user.invalidValue";
public static final String NON_IDENTICAL_BILL_AGREEMENT_MESSAGE = "subscriptionBaseData.nonIdenticalBillingAgreementId";
private TmaSubscriptionBaseFacade tmaSubscriptionBaseFacade;
private TmaDefaultCustomerFacade tmaDefaultCustomerFacade;
 
It should be:
 
private TmaCustomerFacade tmaCustomerFacade;
 
the issue is that we can't extend TmaDefaultCustomerFacade
 
Best regards

entry.title: Bulk retirement of multiple assets
entry.content:
Hi all,
we have not yet found an option in the public cloud for the bulk retirement of multiple assets. We have found a knowledge base article about the topic, but it seems not possible in the cloud: https://me.sap.com/notes/2572879/E

Has anyone the same requirement and has a solution or workaround for it?

Many thanks
Tobias

entry.title: Re: bin determination according to FEFO rule
entry.content: No, I don't need the system to propose an HU. That's why I set bin quantities. Currently, the system proposes bins based on FEFO, but it doesn't account for whether the stock in the bin is sufficient for picking base on FEFO. So I assume that system should look of all storage type bins and propose to pick earles stock from bins. But look like it not happening.

entry.title: Re: Passing Parameters to URL for WebGUI Transactions in...
entry.content:
Hi Alessandro,

It is possible to pass URL parameters in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for WebGUI transactions. You can refer the following URL as an example. https://myXXXXXX.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/bc/gui/sap/its/webgui?~transaction=*VA02%20VBAK-VBELN=41#

Thanks,
Prasanth

entry.title: Re: Work center-specific production confirmation report
entry.content: Which Confirmation transaction is used?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM is now available in EU Access
entry.content:
Hi TomasT,

At this stage there is no way to move an existing tenant to another data center with the data. We are working on this, but this is not possible yet.

So, if you accept to reprovision the tenant, then it should be feasible, but please contact me directly (you should be able to find my SAP email fairly easily)  because I want to check if your customer number is indeed eligible for EU Access provisioning before anything.

Nicolas

entry.title: Error ".txt is not imported prior to export" when publishing compensation data to Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I am getting an error which says ".txt is not imported prior to export" when publishing data from my Compensation worksheet to Employee Central.

I found KBA 2251456 below which explains that the background=element id="compensation" must be present in the data model and can confirm that it is present already. I also checked the type-id of this portlet and also the data-fields within the portlet.

2251456 - Store Compensation data in Live profile. - Compensation Management

Does anyone have any other suggestions please? Thanks in advance.

SAP SuccessFactors Compensation

entry.title: Re: how to configure organization management
entry.content: Preparing for the C_ABAPD_2309 exam can be challenging but I passed the exam in just 2 two months of prep. All thanks goes to passexam4sure.

entry.title: Unlocking Efficiency: Leveraging SAP BTP Document Management Service in Fiori Applications # 2
entry.content:
INTRODUCTION

In today's digital landscape,efficient document management is crucial for businesses aiming to streamline operations and enhance productivity.The SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) Document Management Service offers a robust solution for managing documents seamlessly within SAP Fiori applications.
In this blog series we will explore different scenarios and find suitable solutions to integrate DMS into SAP Fiori Applications. This will help consultants to
Blog # 1: Embed SAP BTP Attachment Reuse UI in a Custom Fiori App  

Blog # 2: Embed SAP BTP Attachment Reuse UI in an SAP Fiori Elements application

Blog # 3: Using SAP BTP DMS in an SAP Business Process Automation and integrate to a Task UI application
Blog # 4: Using SAP BTP DMS API for Custom requirements

In the first part of the blog series,we covered basic features of SAP BTP DMS Service,the Reusable UI component and its integration with a Custom Fiori application.

In the 2nd installment of the series, we will cover using SAP BTP Attachment Reuse UI in

  • Scenario #1: SAP Fiori Elements List Report App (oData V2)
  • Scenario #2: SAP Fiori Elements List Report App (oData V4) in a CAP application

Prerequisite

  1. Set up a Dev Space in Business Application Studio
  2. Add Entitlement for following services in your subaccounta. SAP BTP Document Management Service, Integration Option – Standard (Instance)b. SAP BTP Document Management Service, Application Option – Standard (Subscription)
  3. Cloud Foundry

Setting Up Document Management Service

We have set up SAP BTP DMS in the previous blog. We have created 2 new folders for the purpose of this blog.

 

Note down the Repository ID and Folder ID (Object ID) for the “General” folder. This will be used in the current blog. If you are using DMS Application option, the Root ID and Folder ID can be retrieved form directly the url. I will be in format of
https://<sub-account-url>/cp.portal/site#user-display?sap-ui-app-id-hint=com.sap.ecm.sdm.user&/documents/v1/open/rep=<RepositoryID>&obj=<ObjectID>

You may also use DMS API to retrieve the details. Please check the link shared earlier.

SCENARIO#1

Embed SAP BTP DMS Reuse UI to Fiori Elements App based on Nothwind oData V2 service.

Step 1:

Create a new Fiori Elements Application “dmsreuseui.listreport.v2” using SAP Fiori Generator wizard in Business Application Studio.

 

Step 2:

Update Manifest file to use the Reuse UI.

Add the Component usage following under “sap.ui5” section.

 

 

"componentUsages": {
      "documentTable": {
        "name": "com.sap.ecm.reuse.documentTable"
      }
    },

 

 

After Component Usage ,add the resource roots attribute.

 

 

"resourceRoots": {
      "com.sap.ecm.reuse.documentTable": "./../../comsapecmreuse.comsapecmreusedocumentTable/",
      "com.sap.ecm.reuse.admin": "./../comsapecmreuse.comsapecmreuseadmin/"
    }

 

 

The standard Reuse UI comes in 2 variants “documentTable" and “admin”. We are going to use “documentTable” variant for this blog series.

Step 3:

Add an embedded component.

 

 

"embeddedComponents": {
     "simple:Attachment": {
                "id": "Attachment",
                "componentName": "com.sap.ecm.reuse.documentTable",
                "title": "{{Attachment}}",
                "settings": {
                  "destinationPath": "/comsapecmreuse.comsapecmreusedocumentTable/api",
                  "repositoryId": <Repository ID>,
                  "objectId": <Object ID>
        }
 }

 

 

Step 4:

Update xs-app.json file to include route for DMS Integration API.

 

 

 

{
   "source": "^/comsapecmreuse.comsapecmreusedocumentTable/api(.*)$",
   "target": "$1",
   "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
   "service":"com.sap.ecm.reuse",
   "endpoint": "ecmservice"
}

 

 

Step 5:

Update MTA file to enable authentication and authorization using client credential between Fiori Application and DMS service.

Add Document Management Service, Integration option as a module.

 

 

- name: test-dms
    parameters:
      service-key: 
        name: sdm-key

 

 

 

Add destination configuration for DMS instance using the client credentials.

 

 

- Name: test-dms
   Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
   ServiceInstanceName: test-dms
   ServiceKeyName: sdm-key

 

 

Finally, add the DMS instance under resources section

 

 

- name: test-dms
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: sdm
    service-name: test-dms
    service-plan: standard

 

 

Step 6:

Deploy your app in cloud Foundry environment. You may choose to use context menu in project or use terminal commands (mbt build & cf deploy)

Step 7:

Log-in to SAP BTP Cockpit and find the deployed application under „HTML Applications“ section.

Click on the application to launch it in a new tab.
Select an Order from list Report table and navigate to Object page

The application has the Reuse UI embedded and the "Fiori Elements"  folder is launched as Root folder.

Please note: If you face any issues in rendering of the Attachment section, try using the following code to rerender the component as workaround in Object Page extension.

SCENARIO # 2:

Embed SAP BTP DMS Reuse UI to an SAP CAP Application.

Prerequiisites:

We are going to use sample incidents CAP application. Follow the steps provided in tutorial https://developers.sap.com/group.cap-application-full-stack.html

Step1:

As the Fiori App is already available from the tutorial, we will move to next step to embed the Reuse UI.

Step 2:

Update Manifest file to use the Reuse UI. Add the resource roots attributes

 

 

 

"resourceRoots": {
      "com.sap.ecm.reuse.documentTable": "./../../comsapecmreuse.comsapecmreusedocumentTable/",
      "com.sap.ecm.reuse.admin": "./../comsapecmreuse.comsapecmreuseadmin/"
    }

 

 

The standard Reuse UI comes in 2 variants “documentTable" and “admin”. We are going to use “documentTable” variant for this blog series.

Step 3:

Add an embedded components

 

 

"IncidentsObjectPage": {
          "type": "Component",
          "id": "IncidentsObjectPage",
          "name": "sap.fe.templates.ObjectPage",
          "options": {
            "settings": {
              "editableHeaderContent": false,
              "contextPath": "/Incidents",
              "content": {
                "body": {
                  "sections": {
                    "customAttachmentSection": {
                      "title": "Attachments",
                      "embeddedComponent": {
                        "name": "com.sap.ecm.reuse.documentTable",
                        "settings": {
                          "destinationPath": "/comsapecmreuse.comsapecmreusedocumentTable/api",
                          "repositoryId": <Repository ID>,
                          "objectId”: <Object ID>
                        }
                      }
                    }
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }

 

 

Step 4:

Update xs-app.json file to include route for DMS Integration API.

 

 

{
   "source": "^/comsapecmreuse.comsapecmreusedocumentTable/api(.*)$",
   "target": "$1",
   "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
   "service":"com.sap.ecm.reuse",
   "endpoint": "ecmservice"
}

 

 

Step 5:

Update MTA file to enable authentication and authorization using client credential between Fiori Application and DMS service.

Add Document Management Service, Integration option as a module.

 

 

- name: test-dms
    parameters:
      service-key: 
        name: sdm-key

 

 

Add destination configuration for DMS instance using the client credentials.

 

 

- Name: test-dms
   Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
   ServiceInstanceName: test-dms
   ServiceKeyName: sdm-key

 

 

 

Finally, add the DMS instance under resources section

 

 

- name: test-dms
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: sdm
    service-name: test-dms
    service-plan: standard

 

 

 

 

Step 6:

Deploy your app in cloud Foundry environment. You may choose to use context menu in project or use terminal commands (mbt build & cf deploy)

Step 7:

Log-in to SAP BTP Cockpit and find the deployed application under "HTML Applications" section.

Click on the application to launch it in a new tab.
Select an Order from list Report table and navigate to Object page.

The application has the Reuse UI embedded and the „CAP“ folder is launches as Root folder.

Please note:If you face any issues in rendering of the Attachment section, try using the following code to rerender the component as workaround in Object Page extension.

CONCLUSION:

We learned how to embed the standard SAP BTP DMS Reuse UI in both oData V2 and oData V4 (CAP) based Fiori Element Apps using few simple stepS.In the next blog of the series we will see how SAP BTP DMS can be integrated with SAP Build Process Automation Task UI.

entry.title: Re: How to Use Custom Fields in Sales Document BAPIs
entry.content:
Thanks a lot, 

It was simple to understand and to be used, 

I have  a same requirement but need to update custom fields using "BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE " which were added through CFL.
When i tried to update the fields in header was able to do it, but when trying to do for the line item level its not working, I have checked bape_sdsalesdocitem  structure but this does not have any update flag, I would like to update only custom field using change bapi, Your input will be helpful.

Thanks in advance

Krishna
